summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Ri'DN Partner Dashboard new features: Multi-service booking, Enhanced white labeling, Invoice generation, Upcoming bookings. All backend tests passed (8/8). Frontend UI verified working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: Multi-service booking implemented correctly with service_ids array in public.py
White labeling config includes all required fields: primary_color, secondary_color, text_color, background_color, font_family, logo_url, business_name, tagline
Slot config modal has all 4 tabs: General, Booking Options, Customer Fields, White Label
Invoice modal shows customer info, service details, GST (18%) calculation, and total
Upcoming Bookings widget added to Dashboard and Bookings page
seed_data_creation: Created 3 outlets, 3 services, 1 slot config with multi-service and white labeling, 1 multi-service booking for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: New features tested: 1) Multi-service booking with service_ids array, 2) White labeling with Plus plan (colors, fonts, logo), 3) Invoice generation with GST, 4) Upcoming Bookings widget on Dashboard and Bookings page, 5) Copy Link button in Admin Slot Booking. Public booking URL format: /book/{embed_token}

admin_slot_booking_section.details: Slot Booking Configuration section loads correctly with stats for Configured Outlets, Total Resources, Multi-Service Enabled, Online Booking Enabled

slot_config_modal_tabs.details: Modal opens with all 4 tabs: General, Booking Options, Customer Fields, White Label

multi_service_checkbox.details: Allow Multiple Services toggle available in Booking Options tab with info panel

white_label_tab.details: Shows Free Plan and Plus Plan options. Plus plan enables: Logo upload, Business Name, Tagline, Primary Color, Background Color, Text Color, Button Text Color, Font Family selector, Live Preview

upcoming_bookings_section.details: Bookings page shows Upcoming Bookings section at top with pending appointments

invoice_modal.details: Invoice modal shows: Download button, Print button, Customer info (BILL TO), Service details, GST (18%) calculation, Total amount, Payment Status, Booking ID

public_booking_multi_service.details: Public booking API supports service_ids array. UI shows 'Select Services (multiple allowed)' with checkboxes for each service

dashboard_upcoming_widget.details: Dashboard can show Upcoming Bookings widget with pending/in-progress bookings

copy_link_button.details: Copy Link button works in Admin Slot Booking, shows 'Copied!' confirmation

api_endpoints_tested: GET /api/slot-configs - Returns configs with allow_multiple_services field
POST /api/slot-configs - Creates config with multi-service and branding
GET /api/public/slot-config/{token} - Returns config, outlet, services for public booking
POST /api/public/book - Creates booking with service_ids array
GET /api/bookings - Returns bookings with status field for filtering upcoming
POST /api/dashboard-configs - Creates config with upcomingBookings widget type
frontend_pages_tested: Admin Console > Slot Booking - Stats, outlet list, config modal with all tabs
Bookings page - Upcoming Bookings section, All Bookings table, Invoice modal
Public Booking page - White labeling, multi-service selection, time slots

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real MongoDB database - no mocked endpoints
